title: Feature Request: Tab to next cell (Like excel feature)
excerpt: Adding the feature to be able to use Tab key to move to next cell without needing to use mouse to click in to next cell (Like excel feature) would greatly improve the ease of populating data.

posts.author: ChristineWLF (Christine)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding the feature to be able to use Tab key to move to next cell without needing to use mouse to click in to next cell (Like excel feature) would greatly improve the ease of populating data.

posts.author: screendoor44 (Brett)
posts.cookedHtml: This already exists, although I find it very weirdly skips some columns as you’re tabbing through. I’m sure there’s a reason why it skips over some columns, but I can’t see what that might be. Feels kind of arbirary.
